title: Input & Player Control

classes.name: InputHandler
key_methods: abstract useSchematic(Schematic schem, boolean checkHidden): void
validPlace(int x, int y, Block type, int rotation): boolean
validPlace(int x, int y, Block type, int rotation, BuildPlan ignore): boolean
validPlace(int x, int y, Block type, int rotation, BuildPlan ignore, boolean ignoreUnits): boolean
rebuildArea(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2): void
removeSelection(int x1, y1, x2, y2, boolean): void
getPlan(int x, int y, int size, BuildPlan ignore): BuildPlan
commandTap(float x, float y, boolean queue): void
static_remote_methods: commandUnits(Player, int[], Building, Unit, Vec2, boolean, boolean)

classes.name: MobileInput
key_methods: touchDown(int screenX, int screenY, int pointer, KeyCode): boolean
touchUp(int screenX, int screenY, int pointer, KeyCode): boolean
tap(float x, float y, int count, KeyCode): boolean
pan(float x, float y, float deltaX, float deltaY): boolean
panStop(float x, float y, int pointer, KeyCode): boolean
checkOverlapPlacement(int x, int y, Block): boolean

classes.name: DesktopInput
key_methods: touchDown(float x, float y, int pointer, KeyCode): boolean
tap(float x, float y, int count, KeyCode): boolean

classes.name: BuildPlan
constructors: BuildPlan(int x, int y, int rotation, Block block) — place plan
BuildPlan(int x, int y, int rotation, Block block, Object config) — place plan with config
BuildPlan(int x, int y) — break/remove plan
key_methods: set(int x, int y, int rotation, Block block): BuildPlan

key_relationships: InputHandler has-many BuildPlan via linePlans:Seq<BuildPlan>, selectPlans:Seq<BuildPlan>, lastPlans:Queue<BuildPlan>
InputHandler uses BlockInventoryFragment, BlockConfigFragment, PlanConfigFragment (UI fragments)
InputHandler stores Unit references: selectedUnits, lastUnit, spectating, controlledType
BuildPlan references Block (the block to place/break)
MobileInput has Seq<BuildPlan> removals (fading-out removed plans)
MobileInput uses PlaceMode enum for current mode
DesktopInput uses PlaceMode enum for current mode
InputHandler uses QuadTree<BuildPlan> for spatial lookup (playerPlanTree, selectPlanTree)

mobile_vs_desktop_differences.movement: Mobile: gesture-based with autoPan edge-scrolling, targetPos approach; Desktop: WASD axis input + mouse aim
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.shooting: Mobile: manualShooting flag toggled by longPress, auto-targeting; Desktop: mouse-click (Binding.select) toggles shouldShoot
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.line_mode: Mobile: longPress triggers lineMode for line/area placement; Desktop: click-drag (selectX/selectY tracking) for line placement
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.schematic: Mobile: mode=schematicSelect/rebuildSelect with on-screen region drag; Desktop: Binding.schematicSelect key-hold + drag
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.build_confirm: Mobile: explicit 'confirm' button in buildPlacementUI to flush selectPlans; Desktop: key-release flushes linePlans automatically
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.command_mode: Mobile: commandMode button in buildUI + queueCommandMode toggle; Desktop: Binding.commandMode key + control group bindings (1-10)
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.payload: Mobile: payloadTarget position/unit/building tracked per tap; Desktop: Binding.pickupCargo/dropCargo key bindings with hold-repeat logic
mobile_vs_desktop_differences.zoom: Mobile: pinch-to-zoom via GestureListener.zoom(); Desktop: scroll wheel (Binding.zoom)

build_plan_flow.placing: tap/click → validPlace() → selectPlans.add(new BuildPlan(x,y,rot,block,config)) → confirm/flush → player.unit().addBuild(plan.copy())
build_plan_flow.breaking: tap/click → validBreak() → selectPlans.add(new BuildPlan(x,y)) → confirm/flush → tryBreakBlock(x,y)
build_plan_flow.line_mode: longPress/drag → lineMode=true → updateLine(startX, startY, endX, endY) fills linePlans → touchUp/key-release → flushSelectPlans(linePlans)
build_plan_flow.schematic: useSchematic(schem, checkHidden) → schematics.toPlans(schem, cx, cy) → fills selectPlans → confirm → player.unit().addBuild(each.copy())
build_plan_flow.removal_animation: removePlan(plan) → selectPlans.remove(plan) + removals.add(plan) → animScale lerps to 0 → removed from removals list

important_notes: InputHandler is abstract; concrete instances are MobileInput (mobile/touch) and DesktopInput (keyboard+mouse)
PlaceMode enum drives which UI and input-handling branch is active (none/placing/breaking/schematicSelect/rebuildSelect)
Both subclasses maintain their own PlaceMode 'mode' field (not inherited from InputHandler)
Build queue managed at two levels: selectPlans (pending/staged by input) and player.unit().plans (confirmed, network-synced)
Remote static methods in InputHandler are network-synced via @Remote annotation (called on server or both sides)
Control groups (IntSeq[] controlGroups, 10 slots) are Desktop-only feature for RTS-style unit grouping
MobileInput.removals is an additional Seq for fade-out animation of removed BuildPlans (not in DesktopInput)
Schematic.Stile is an inner class representing a single tile entry within a schematic blueprint
QuadTree spatial indexing is used for fast plan lookup by position (getPlan, updateSelectQuadtree)
